history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! Since you're feeling indecisive, how about we start with the Classic Cheeseburger? It’s our most popular option and safe for most allergies (no shellfish or nuts). Would you like to add a water with that? Just confirm your order—I’ll take it right away!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait, I'm lactose intolerant—does the Classic Cheeseburger have dairy? Can you suggest something without cheese? I need ~1778 kcal.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry—the Classic Cheeseburger contains dairy (milk and cheese), so it's not safe for lactose intolerance. Right now, our system doesn't show any dairy-free or cheese-free options—would you like me to check your phone app for the latest menu? For 1778 kcal, a Big Mac (650 kcal) with large fries (300 kcal) and a side salad (250 kcal) would total around 1200 kcal, so we could add more to reach your target—I’d be happy to help!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait, I think I'll go with the Filet-O-Fish (dairy-free) and large fries to get closer to 1778. Does that work?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect choice! Your Filet-O-Fish (dairy-free) and large fries are safe for lactose intolerance. Right now they total about 650 kcal—would you like to add a side salad (250 kcal) or sweet potato chips (150 kcal) to get closer to 1778? I’ll take it right away!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait, add the salad and chips—wait, do you have any higher-calorie options?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great choice—your Filet-O-Fish, large fries, salad, and chips now total **1,350 kcal**. To get closer to 1,778, would you like to add a **large soda (150 kcal)** or **extra fries (150 kcal)**? I’ll take it right away!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait, extra fries? Do you have a higher-calorie option?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great question! For your 1,778 kcal target, the **double Filet-O-Fish** (dairy-free, 640 kcal) would be the highest-calorie option we have that’s safe for lactose intolerance. With your current order (fries, salad, chips), this brings you to **1,570 kcal**—just 208 kcal short of your goal. Would you like to add a small soda (150 kcal) to get closer? I’ll take it right away!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait... small soda? That brings me to 1720—just 58 short. Do you have a tiny snack? I’ll take it if it’s safe for lactose. Thanks!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great catch—your current order (double Filet-O-Fish, large fries, salad, chips, and small soda) totals **1,870 kcal** (just 92 kcal over your goal). For a *lactose-safe* tiny snack under 58 kcal, we don’t have standard options—our smallest lactose-free item is a **small apple** (95 kcal), but it’s not drive-thru friendly. Would you like to go with the small soda (150 kcal) instead? I’ll take it right away! 😊

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, small apple—lactose-safe. But drive-thru doesn’t handle apples, so I’ll take the small soda instead. I’ll take it!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect—your final order is: **Double Filet-O-Fish (dairy-free), large fries, side salad, sweet potato chips, and small soda** (all lactose-safe). I’ll take it right away! 😊 Thanks for the clear decision—you’ve got exactly what you need.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Wait... okay, that’s exactly what I need. Take it! 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect—your final order is confirmed: **Double Filet-O-Fish (dairy-free), large fries, side salad, sweet potato chips, and small soda** (all lactose-safe). I’ll take it right away! 😊 Thanks for the clear decision—you’ve got exactly what you need.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Take it! 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed! Taking it right now — all lactose-safe. 😊
